lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
Raag Soohee, First Mehl, Chau-Padhay, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਂਡਾ ਧੋਇ ਬੈਸਿ ਧੂਪੁ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਤਉ ਦੂਧੈ ਕਉ ਜਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanddaa dhoe bais dhoop devahu tau doodhai kau jaavahu |
lines.english: Wash the vessel, sit down and anoint it with fragrance; then, go out and get the milk.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਧੁ ਕਰਮ ਫੁਨਿ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਮਾਇਣੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਰਾਸ ਜਮਾਵਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: doodh karam fun surat samaaein hoe niraas jamaavahu |1|
lines.english: Add the rennet of clear consciousness to the milk of good deeds, and then, free of desire, let it curdle. ||1||
Chant the Name of the One Lord.
All other actions are fruitless. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਈਟੀ ਹਾਥਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਫੁਨਿ ਨੇਤ੍ਰਉ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man eettee haath karahu fun netrau need na aavai |
lines.english: Let your mind be the handles, and then churn it, without sleeping.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਤਬ ਮਥੀਐ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rasanaa naam japahu tab matheeai in bidh amrit paavahu |2|
lines.english: If you chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord ,with your tongue, then the curd will be churned. In this way, the Ambrosial Nectar is obtained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜਾ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਜੇ ਸੇਵੇ ਇਨੑ ਬਿਧਿ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਰਵਤੁ ਰਹੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: poojaa praan sevak je seve ina bidh saahib ravat rahai |3|
lines.english: That humble servant who dedicates and offers his life, and who serves in this way, remains absorbed in his Lord and Master. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਸੰਪਟੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਤ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਵਣੁ ਭਾਵਨ ਪਾਤੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: man sanpatt jit sat sar naavan bhaavan paatee tripat kare |
lines.english: Wash your mind in the pool of Truth, and let it be the vessel of the Lord; let this be your offering to please Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਹੀਣੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਨੁ ਜੰਪੈ ਹਉ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਈ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhagat heen naanak jan janpai hau saalaahee sachaa soee |4|1|
lines.english: Servant Nanak, lacking devotion, humbly prays: may I sing the Praises of the True Lord. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਦੇ ਕਹਹਿ ਕਹੇ ਕਹਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਤੁਮ ਸਰਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: kahade kaheh kahe keh jaaveh tum sar avar na koee |
lines.english: The speakers speak and speak and speak, and then they depart. There is no other to compare to You.
Soohee, First Mehl, Second House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Meditate on such spiritual wisdom, O my mind,
Deep within the self, the Lord abides; do not go outside looking for Him.
You have renounced the Ambrosial Nectar - why are you eating poison? ||1||
but bound in bondage, the whole world is wandering around in confusion. ||2||
and become the slave of the True Lord. ||1||Pause||
Everyone speaks of wisdom and meditation;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਨਹੀ ਚੰਗੇ ਬੁਰਾ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ham nahee change buraa nahee koe |
lines.english: I am not good; no one is bad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal rav rahiaa soe |3|
lines.english: The Lord is pervading and permeating the water, the land, and the sky. ||3||
One who serves the Lord is His servant.
Prays Nanak, He alone saves us! ||4||1||2||
